description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this beige barrel shaped messenger bag from fastrack. Carry it to college , or on a casual day out with your friends to become the talk of the town! And don't be deceived by its compact look - there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Width: 35 cm Diameter: 20cm Product Details Made of nylon for enhanced durability Buttoned flap concealing a roomy zippered compartment and a small pouch on the front One small pouch and a mobile pouch in the main compartment for stashing away essentials Zippered pocket at the back Single adjustable shoulder strap Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
